menu.disclaimer: Consuming raw or undercooked meats, poultry, seafood, shellfish, or eggs may increase your risk of a food borne illness. Please let your server know of any allergies. Menu marks Vegetarian Option and Spicy items.

analysisNotes: Menu explicitly asks guests to tell the server about allergies, and marks vegetarian/spicy items — a good sign of engagement even without a full allergen guide.
'Fried Ritz' crackers top both salads (Green Salad and Caesar Salad) — Ritz crackers contain wheat, so ask to omit for a gluten-free order.
The CAB Smoked Brisket Burger is served on a seeded bun, which may contain sesame (a top allergen) — ask about substituting a different bun.

No dedicated allergen guide or online menu labeling beyond the general disclaimer; several fried items (chicken fingers, spicy fried chicken sandwich, smoked wings) likely share fryers, so ask about cross-contact.
Boiled peanut hummus appears twice (apps and kids menu) — not a concern for this household, but worth flagging for anyone with a peanut allergy.
